desc: Sidekick cut our onboarding time in half. New hires used to interrupt managers constantly with the same questions—now they just text and get instant answers. It's been a game-changer for productivity.

desc: Our employees speak five different languages. Before Sidekick, training was a nightmare—we'd have to translate everything or find bilingual supervisors. Now everyone just texts in their own language and gets help instantly.

desc: The gap detection feature is incredible. Sidekick showed us that 40% of questions were about our PTO policy—turns out our handbook was confusing. We fixed it in a day and those questions dropped to near zero.
desc2: The gap detection feature is incredible. Sidekick showed us that 40% of questions were about our PTO policy—turns out our handbook was confusing. We fixed it in a day and those questions dropped to near zero.

desc5: The gap detection feature is incredible. Sidekick showed us that 40% of questions were about our PTO policy—turns out our handbook was confusing.

desc: We have 200 warehouse workers across three shifts. Managers used to spend 2+ hours a day answering repetitive questions. Sidekick handles 80% of those automatically now—it literally pays for itself in saved time.
desc2: We have 200 warehouse workers across three shifts. Managers used to spend 2+ hours a day answering repetitive questions. Sidekick handles 80% of those automatically now—it literally pays for itself in saved time.

desc: I love that workers can send voice memos. Many of our team members aren't comfortable typing in English, but they can speak their question in Spanish and get a response right away. It makes everyone feel included.

desc: The analytics dashboard is a goldmine. I can see exactly what topics are confusing new hires and proactively update our training materials. It's like having a direct line to what employees actually need to know.
